lyricText:
[ti:希望有羽毛和翅膀 (Hope Is the Thing With Feathers)]
[ar:知更鸟/HOYO-MiX/Chevy]
[al:崩坏星穹铁道-空气蛹 INSIDE]
[by:]
[offset:0]
[00:00.00]希望有羽毛和翅膀 (Hope Is the Thing With Feathers) - 知更鸟/HOYO-MiX/Chevy
[00:01.64]作曲 Composer：王可鑫 Eli.W (HOYO-MiX)
[00:02.45]作词 Lyricist：Ruby Qu
[00:02.85]编曲 Arranger：王可鑫 Eli.W (HOYO-MiX)
[00:03.76]制作人 Producer：王可鑫 Eli.W (HOYO-MiX)
[00:15.92]We rise together as our destiny unfolds
[00:21.98]We face the darkness and our trials are yet untold
[00:29.76]Through the shadows of despair
[00:33.50]Oh in silence hopes we share
[00:37.22]To chase our dreams that we've declared
[00:44.74]We glimpse through our eyes
[00:48.48]Yet fools blind our sights
[00:52.16]Can't make what they say
[00:55.29]We'll find our way we'll find our way
[00:59.26]Heads up The wheels are spinning
[01:04.08]Across the plains in valleys deep
[01:07.22]To dawn the wheels that sing
[01:11.59]An unending dream
[01:14.88]Heads up the tracks are running
[01:19.03]Across the plains where shadows hide
[01:22.35]We run we stride
[01:30.86]In the face of fear and plight and yet we hold our ground
[01:37.18]In life we stand and strive our victory is found
[01:44.85]And the storms we've weathered through
[01:48.43]And we hope in the light of truth
[01:52.04]To break free from chains and come anew
[01:59.98]Heads up The wheels are spinning
[02:03.64]Across the plains in valleys deep
[02:07.43]To dawn the wheels that sing
[02:11.44]An unending dream
[02:14.94]Heads up the tracks are running
[02:19.07]Across the plains where shadows hide
[02:22.49]We run we stride
[02:42.39]Heads up A steady rhythm
[03:03.87]A destination that's ever near
[03:07.36]It comes Stride to our kingdom
[03:11.44]And see the light of day
[03:14.93]Heads up the wheels are singing
[03:18.83]The whispers and secrets they'd keep
[03:22.34]To hope We bound
[03:31.04]Break free we chased our dreams beneath the starry night
[03:38.33]In the face of god we rose as one
[03:43.99]人声 Vocal Artist：Chevy
[03:44.71]木吉他 Acoustic Guitar：陈义
[03:44.80]电吉他 Electric Guitar：陈义
[03:44.89]架子鼓 Drums：眭逸凡Patrick
[03:45.00]和声 Backing Vocal：Chevy/宫奇Gon (HOYO-MiX)/温菁 Jing.W (HOYO-MiX)/林一凡Fan (HOYO-MiX)/王可鑫 Eli.W (HOYO-MiX)
[03:45.36]人声录音棚 Vocal Recording Studio：The Hideout Recording Studio
[03:45.51]人声录音师 Vocal Recording Engineer：Nik Hotchkiss
[03:45.63]乐器录音棚 Instrumental Recording Studio：升赫录音棚Soundhub Studio
